comments.body:
> Test coverage is excellent — all four auth endpoints are covered and the Redis mock usage is correct.
> 
> One issue to fix before merge: the register success test asserts body.data.token, but the login success test asserts body.data.accessToken. These two endpoints return different field names for the same concept, which is inconsistent. Please align them — either both use token or both use accessToken. This should be fixed in the route handler, not just the test assertion.

----fixed, replace token with accessToken

reviews.body:
Test coverage is excellent — all four auth endpoints are covered and the Redis mock usage is correct.

One issue to fix before merge: the register success test asserts body.data.token, but the login success test asserts body.data.accessToken. These two endpoints return different field names for the same concept, which is inconsistent. Please align them — either both use token or both use accessToken. This should be fixed in the route handler, not just the test assertion.

title: test: add integration tests for auth routes
